reptile.deleteConfirm: Tem certeza de que deseja excluir este réptil?

validation.nameMin: O nome deve ter pelo menos 2 caracteres
validation.observationMin: A observação deve ter pelo menos 3 caracteres

admin.comingSoon: Em breve: gestão de usuários, assinaturas Stripe, estatísticas detalhadas...

testers.note: Testers can access the app even in maintenance mode, but don't have admin privileges.
testers.userNotFound: No user found with this email

testers.title: Gestão de testadores

gdpr.title: Consentimento e Privacidade
gdpr.intro: Para usar o S-reptrack, precisamos do seu consentimento para coletar e processar seus dados pessoais de acordo com o RGPD.
gdpr.rightsDescription: Você tem o direito de acessar, corrigir, exportar ou excluir seus dados a qualquer momento nas configurações.
gdpr.dataPrivacyDescription: Gerencie seus dados pessoais e direitos RGPD
gdpr.exportDataDescription: Baixe todos os seus dados em formato JSON. Isso inclui seu perfil, répteis, histórico de alimentação, registros de saúde e observações de reprodução.
gdpr.deleteAccountWarning: ⚠️ Esta ação é irreversível. Todos os seus dados serão excluídos permanentemente de nossos servidores.
gdpr.deleteConfirmError: Por favor, digite SUPPRIMER para confirmar

intro.title: Introdução
intro.content: S-reptrack respeita sua privacidade e está comprometido em proteger seus dados pessoais. Esta política de privacidade explica como coletamos, usamos e protegemos suas informações.

items.email: Seu endereço de email para autenticação
items.reptileData: Informações sobre seus répteis (nome, espécie, idade, etc.)

items.management: Permitir que você gerencie seus répteis
items.notifications: Send you important notifications (upcoming hatchings, feeding reminders)

dataSecurity.title: Segurança de Dados
dataSecurity.content: Usamos medidas de segurança padrão da indústria para proteger seus dados. Todos os dados são criptografados em trânsito e em repouso. Também aplicamos políticas de senha rigorosas para proteger sua conta.

userRights.title: Seus Direitos

items.deletion: Solicitar a exclusão de sua conta e dados
items.opposition: Right to object: object to the processing of your data
items.restriction: Right to restriction: restrict the processing of your data

userRights.intro: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:
userRights.exercise: To exercise these rights, go to Settings > Privacy and Data in the Application, or contact us at contact@s-reptrack.app

dataSharing.title: Compartilhamento de Dados
dataSharing.content: Não vendemos nem compartilhamos seus dados pessoais com terceiros. Seus dados permanecem privados e são acessíveis apenas por você.

items.legal: Competent authorities if required by law
items.hosting: Our hosting provider (secure cloud infrastructure) for data storage
items.payment: Our payment provider (Stripe) for subscription processing

contact.title: Contato
contact.content: Para qualquer pergunta sobre esta política de privacidade ou seus dados pessoais, entre em contato conosco através das configurações do aplicativo.

copyright.title: Direitos Autorais e Propriedade Intelectual
copyright.content: Todos os conteúdos, designs, código e funcionalidades do S-reptrack são protegidos pelas leis de direitos autorais e propriedade intelectual:

items.code: O código-fonte e a arquitetura da aplicação são protegidos
items.design: Os designs, interfaces e elementos visuais são nossa propriedade exclusiva
items.content: Todos os textos, imagens e conteúdos são protegidos por direitos autorais
items.prohibited: A cópia, reprodução, modificação ou distribuição não autorizada de toda ou parte da aplicação é estritamente proibida e sujeita a ações legais

legalBasis.intro: We process your personal data on the following legal bases:

items.legitimate: Our legitimate interest in improving our services and ensuring the security of the Application
items.contract: Performance of the service contract when you use our Application
items.consent: Your explicit consent when creating your account

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing

minors.title: Protection of Minors
minors.content: The Application is not intended for children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors.

international.content: Your data is hosted in the European Union. In case of transfer to third countries, appropriate safeguards are in place in accordance with GDPR.
international.title: International Transfers

authority.content: If you believe that the processing of your personal data violates GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with CNIL: www.cnil.fr
authority.title: Supervisory Authority

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. In case of substantial changes, you will be notified through the Application.

dataRetention.content: Your personal data is retained as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, all data will be permanently erased within 30 days.
dataRetention.title: Data Retention

dataController.content: The data controller is F.M. BERTIN, sole proprietor registered in France, operating the S-reptrack application. Email: contact@s-reptrack.app | Website: https://s-reptrack.app
dataController.title: Data Controller

cookies.content: The Application uses your browser's local storage to remember your preferences (language, theme, GDPR consent). We do not use advertising tracking cookies.
cookies.title: Cookies and Local Storage

install.title: Instalar o aplicativo
install.description: Adicione S-reptrack à sua tela inicial para uma experiência em tela cheia e acesso offline.

android.title: Android (Chrome)
android.instruction: Use o menu ⋮ e depois 'Adicionar à tela inicial'.
android.installNotReady: Botão habilitado quando a instalação for possível
android.tip: If the button doesn't activate, use the manual steps above
android.step2: Tap the ⋮ menu (3 vertical dots in top right)
android.step1: Open Chrome and go to s-reptrack.app
android.step3: Tap 'Install app' or 'Add to Home screen'
android.done: The S-reptrack icon appears on your home screen!
android.subtitle: Follow these simple steps

ios.title: iPhone (Safari)
ios.instruction: Toque no botão 'Compartilhar' e depois em 'Adicionar à Tela de Início'. O botão acima não está disponível no iOS.
ios.step1: Open Safari and go to s-reptrack.app
ios.warning: Installation does NOT work with Chrome, Firefox or other browsers on iOS
ios.important: Don't confuse with 'S-reptrack app' that sometimes appears in the menu - this option doesn't work. Only use 'Add to Home Screen'.
ios.subtitle: Safari is required
ios.requirement: Required browser: Safari only (Chrome doesn't work)
ios.step2: Tap the Share icon (square with arrow pointing up)
ios.done: The S-reptrack icon appears on your home screen!

transfer.title: Transferir animal
transfer.description: Transferir {{name}} para outro usuário do S-reptrack
transfer.messagePlaceholder: Adicionar uma nota para o destinatário...
transfer.readOnlyAccess: You are viewing an animal you have transferred. You can only view information, not modify it.

landing.heroDescription: S-reptrack é a aplicação tudo-em-um para criadores apaixonados. Acompanhamento de alimentação, reprodução, saúde e muito mais.
landing.featuresDescription: Funcionalidades poderosas para gerenciar sua criação de forma eficiente, acessíveis de qualquer dispositivo.
landing.featureQrDescription: Scan NFC tags to instantly identify each animal in your collection.
landing.featureNfcDescription: Escaneie etiquetas NFC para acessar instantaneamente as fichas dos seus répteis.
landing.featureFeedingDescription: Planeje e acompanhe as refeições de cada animal com lembretes automáticos.
landing.featureHealthDescription: Registre visitas veterinárias, tratamentos e problemas de saúde.
landing.featureReproDescription: Acompanhe acasalamentos, posturas e eclosões com notificações de alerta.
landing.featureCitesDescription: Base de dados completa de espécies com anexos CITES integrados.
landing.featureWeight: Acompanhamento de peso com gráficos de evolução
landing.featureMorphs: Gestão de morfos e linhagens genéticas
landing.securePayment: Pagamento seguro por Stripe. Cancele a qualquer momento.
landing.installDescription: Instale S-reptrack no seu celular em segundos, sem passar por uma loja.
landing.installStep1Description: Acesse S-reptrack pelo seu navegador móvel
landing.installStep2Description: Toque no menu (⋮ no Android, Compartilhar no iPhone)
landing.installStep3Description: Selecione 'Adicionar à tela inicial' ou 'Instalar aplicativo'
landing.ctaDescription: Junte-se aos criadores que confiam no S-reptrack para gerenciar sua coleção de répteis.
landing.quickSignupDescription: Visit our website to sign up and start managing your breeding.
landing.comparisonSubtitle: Compare as duas ofertas e escolha a que melhor se adapta a si

comingSoon.title: Em breve
comingSoon.description: Nossa aplicação de gestão de criação de répteis chegará muito em breve. Fique ligado!

installBanner.title: Instalar aplicativo
installBanner.description: Instale o S-reptrack para uma melhor experiência
installBanner.iosInstructions: Toque no ícone de compartilhar e depois em "Adicionar à Tela de Início"
installBanner.iosStep2: Scroll and tap 'Add to Home Screen'

shedding.title: Histórico de mudas
shedding.emptyHint: Clique em "Adicionar muda" para começar o rastreamento

bowel.title: Histórico de fezes
bowel.emptyHint: Clique em "Adicionar" para começar o rastreamento

items.warranty: In the event of any failure of the Application to conform to any applicable warranty, you may notify Apple, which will refund the purchase price. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Apple has no other warranty obligation. Any other claims related to non-conformity are the sole responsibility of F.M. BERTIN.
items.beneficiary: You acknowledge and agree that Apple and its subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of these Terms. Upon your acceptance, Apple will have the right to enforce these Terms against you as a third-party beneficiary.
items.thirdParty: You must comply with applicable third-party terms when using the Application.
items.agreement: These Terms constitute an agreement between you and F.M. BERTIN (the publisher), not with Apple Inc. Apple is not a party to this agreement.
items.maintenance: F.M. BERTIN is solely responsible for providing maintenance and support services. Apple has no obligation to provide any maintenance or support services.
items.license: The license granted is a non-transferable license limited to use of the Application on any Apple-branded device you own or control, in accordance with the Apple Media Services Terms and Conditions.

appStore.title: App Store (Apple) Provisions
appStore.intro: If you downloaded the Application from Apple's App Store, the following provisions apply:

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: The Application, its source code, design, features and content are the exclusive property of the publisher and are protected by French and international intellectual property laws. Any unauthorized reproduction, modification or use is strictly prohibited.

subscription.title: Subscription and Pricing

items.cancel: The subscription can be cancelled at any time from Settings. Premium access remains active until the end of the paid period
items.payment: Payments are processed securely by our payment provider
items.premium: Premium version: unlimited number of reptiles (€5.99/month or €49.99/year)
items.free: Free version: access to all features for up to 5 reptiles

subscription.intro: The Application offers a free and a premium plan:

access.title: Access to the Service

items.security: Maintain the confidentiality of login credentials
items.age: Be at least 16 years old (or have parental authorization)

access.intro: To use the Application, the User must:

items.respect: Respect the intellectual property rights of the publisher
items.accurate: Provide accurate information and keep it up to date
items.noAbuse: Not attempt to circumvent security measures or Service limitations
items.legal: Use the Application in accordance with applicable laws
items.noHarm: Not use the Application for illegal activities, including trafficking of protected species

liability.title: Limitation of Liability

items.data: Data loss resulting from circumstances beyond its control
items.indirect: Indirect damages resulting from the use of the Application
items.thirdParty: Content of third-party sites accessible via links from the Application
items.availability: Service interruptions, bugs, or technical malfunctions

liability.intro: The publisher cannot be held liable for:

services.intro: The Application offers the following features:

items.tracking: Reptile management and tracking (information, photos, weight)

services.title: Description of Services

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any questions, complaints or requests regarding these Terms or the Application, you can contact us:

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: The publisher reserves the right to suspend or delete any account in case of violation of these Terms, without notice or compensation. The User may delete their account at any time from the Application settings.

definitions.serviceDef: All features offered by the Application
definitions.contentDef: Any information, data, text or image submitted by the User
definitions.title: Definitions
definitions.appDef: The S-reptrack progressive web application accessible at s-reptrack.app
definitions.userDef: Any individual or legal entity using the Application

userContent.content: The User retains ownership of their data and content. By using the Application, the User grants the publisher a limited license to store, display and process this content solely for the purpose of providing the Service.
userContent.title: User Content

object.title: Purpose
object.content: The S-reptrack Application is a reptile breeding management platform enabling tracking of animals, their feeding, health, and reproduction. These Terms define the conditions of access and use of the Application.

modifications.content: The publisher reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Users will be informed of substantial changes. Continued use of the Application after modification constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
modifications.title: Modifications

law.content: These Terms are governed by French law. In case of dispute, and after failure of any amicable resolution attempt, French courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
law.title: Applicable Law and Jurisdiction

preamble.content: These Terms of Use govern the use of the S-reptrack application. By accessing the application and creating an account, you unconditionally accept these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the application.
preamble.title: Preamble

autoRenewal.content: Premium subscriptions (monthly at €5.99/month and annual at €49.99/year) automatically renew at the end of each period unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. On iOS, renewal is managed by Apple through your Apple account settings. On other platforms, payment is managed by Stripe. You can cancel at any time from the Application settings or your device settings.
autoRenewal.title: Subscription Auto-Renewal

subscription.nfcNote: ⚠️ NFC requires the native iOS or Android app.

subscription.appleRenewNote: Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period, at the same rate.
subscription.inactiveDescription: Manage up to 5 reptiles for free. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited.
subscription.appleChargeNote: Payment will be charged to your iTunes account at confirmation of purchase.

subscription.autoRenewDisclosure: Subscription automatically renews at the end of each period unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
subscription.limitReachedDescription: Upgrade to Premium to add unlimited reptiles.
subscription.activeDescription: You have access to all Premium features
subscription.appleCancelNote: You can manage and cancel your subscriptions in your App Store account settings after purchase.

genealogy.addParentLinkDescription: Define the parents of a reptile.
genealogy.parentAlreadySet: This parent type is already defined for this reptile
genealogy.selectAtLeastOneParent: Please select at least one parent (mother or father)
